client_id.description: Snapchat Marketing API OAuth 2.0 client ID for the refresh-token grant. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Snapchat Marketing API OAuth 2.0 client secret. Used only in the token-request form; never logged.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived Snapchat Marketing API OAuth 2.0 refresh token. Exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it).

base_url.description: Snapchat Ads API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: Snapchat OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. MUST be http(s) with a host; the hook fails closed on an invalid value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token/client secret to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

organization_ids.description: Comma-separated list of Snapchat organization ids to read ad accounts for (required for the adaccounts stream, e.g. "org1,org2").

ad_account_ids.description: Comma-separated list of Snapchat ad account ids to read campaigns/adsquads/ads for (required for the campaigns, adsquads, and ads streams, e.g. "ACC1,ACC2").
